requested_channels_legend: zh: wechat | institutional_news | group_share | video | zhihu | xiaohongshu; en: github | linkedin | bluesky | x | lay_summary; v0.1 aliases (wechat_article, bilibili_video, github_readme_release) are normalized on load
completed_channel_outputs_legend: map of channel ID -> list of generated file paths
channel_review_status_legend: map of channel ID -> draft | reviewed | approved
file_status_legend: map of output path -> draft | reviewed | approved; never downgrade approved without user consent
backward_compatibility_note: state files without v0.2 fields (requested_channels, completed_channel_outputs, channel_review_status, platform_specific_risks, schema_version) are valid v0.1 states; treat missing fields as defaults and add them on next write
